root_cause.text: A memory leak occurs in `ReadDIBImage` because the allocated `dib_colormap` buffer is not freed before throwing an exception when there is insufficient image data.
root_cause.evidence: The patch adds `dib_colormap=(unsigned char *) RelinquishMagickMemory(dib_colormap);` right before the `ThrowReaderException(CorruptImageError,"InsufficientImageDataInFile");` call.

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: A memory leak occurs in `ReadDIBImage` because the allocated `dib_colormap` buffer is not freed before throwing an exception when there is insufficient image data.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch adds `dib_colormap=(unsigned char *) RelinquishMagickMemory(dib_colormap);` right before the `ThrowReaderException(CorruptImageError,"InsufficientImageDataInFile");` call.

intent_record.intent_summary: Fix memory leak by freeing the colormap buffer when encountering insufficient image data.
intent_record.what: Added a call to RelinquishMagickMemory for dib_colormap before throwing a CorruptImageError exception.
intent_record.how: Prevents a memory leak by ensuring the allocated colormap memory is freed if the image data reading fails.

grouping_result.intent: Fix memory leak by freeing the colormap buffer when encountering insufficient image data.

relevance_review.reason: The group directly addresses the memory leak by freeing the colormap buffer when there is insufficient image data, which matches the described root cause.

candidates.rationale: This line throws an exception without freeing the dib_colormap buffer, leading to a memory leak.

vuln_statements.explanation: This statement throws an exception due to insufficient image data but fails to free the previously allocated dib_colormap buffer, causing a memory leak.

bic_trace_step.reason: In `ReadDIBImage`, `dib_colormap` is allocated using `AcquireQuantumMemory`. Shortly after, if `ReadBlob` fails to read the expected amount of data, an exception is thrown (`ThrowReaderException(CorruptImageError,"InsufficientImageDataInFile");`) without freeing the `dib_colormap` buffer, leading to a memory leak.
